report:
## Summary
Cory, your performance has shown some improvement over the last few weeks, particularly with your productivity peaking at 33.6 hours during the week of April 4th to April 10th. However, your recent weekly totals have dropped, averaging just 26.4 hours last week, which is significantly below our goal of 47.5 hours.

## What's Working
- You achieved a notable 33.6 hours the week of April 4th to April 10th, demonstrating your capability to meet demands when fully engaged.
- Your work on April 11th, where you billed 11.8 hours, shows you can have highly productive days when focused.
- You have effectively managed to complete several complex repairs, such as the engine issue on RO 777108, indicating strong technical skills.
- Your ability to handle high-priority ROs, including the engine knocking and battery issues, shows you’re trusted with critical tasks that require immediate attention.

## Where to Focus
- Your total hours have consistently been below the goal, with only 26.4 hours last week (April 25th to May 1st). This is concerning as it impacts overall department efficiency. Aim to increase your daily billable hours, especially on Mondays and Fridays where you had lower outputs.
- The RO 777108 (engine work) is 32 days old. It’s important to prioritize this and push for completion, as aging ROs can impact customer satisfaction and workflow.
- The RO 777209 (battery issue) requires immediate follow-up. Completing this quickly can help you regain momentum and improve your weekly performance metrics.
- You have several high-priority jobs in the shared queue, particularly RO 777092 (timing issue) and RO 777158 (A/C issue). Picking one of these up could help boost your hours and demonstrate your proactive approach to problem-solving.

## Action Items for This Week
1. Prioritize completing RO 777108 (engine) to reduce aging ROs and focus on getting parts installed.
2. Follow up on RO 777209 (battery) to ensure it’s resolved quickly, allowing you to move on to the next tasks.
3. Select and take on one of the high-priority jobs from the shared queue, such as RO 777092 (timing issue), to increase your billable hours this week.

## WIP Watchlist
- Focus on RO 777108 (engine) as it is aging and requires timely completion. Also, keep an eye on the high-priority ROs in the shared queue to maximize your productivity this week.
